notes: Apache Gravitino is a federated metadata lake / open data catalog (originally from Datastrato) that competes with Unity Catalog and Polaris for Iceberg governance. The name is the physics particle ‚ÄĒ graviton plus the Italian diminutive -ino ‚ÄĒ and dictionaries give grav-i-TEE-noh, stress on 'tee', with 'vi' as a short 'ih' rather than 'vye'. The project publishes no pronunciation guidance of its own, so the dictionary reading of the particle is the consensus.
